channel.title: Junkie on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Junkie on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: What Kind of Open Source Fanboy are you ?
item.description:
James Dixon has some polls on his blog, they let you choose between being a free software junkie, an open source hacker or what I’d call a an incompetent moron ;)

I had mostly 2’s , no 3 in case you’d wonder.
